description: Gremlin provides an enterprise reliability platform for chaos engineering, reliability testing, and resilience analysis. It helps teams uncover availability risks, run experiments, and analyze reliability data across their systems.
summary: Gremlin exposes a REST API at https://api.gremlin.com/v1, a locally run Gremlin CLI, and a packaged Gremlin MCP server for LLM integrations; all documented developer surfaces require Gremlin-issued credentials.
